findings.title: Path Traversal in Explorer module via zip and move actions
findings.input_controlled: The POST parameter item in zip, unzip, move, rename, delete actions.
findings.reach_vulnerability: An attacker sends a POST request with action=zip and item=.. while having access to a subfolder.
findings.impact: The attacker can zip or move files outside their authorized scoped directory, potentially gaining access to other users private files or system files within the company storage root.
